nodes.label: AI as tool for lesson planning
nodes.grounding_span: I use it regularly for generating content

nodes.label: AI as efficiency enhancer for out-of-field teaching
nodes.label_negative: Struggling without AI support in unfamiliar subjects
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me do that more efficiently

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as one-time check or shortcut
nodes.grounding_span: It's definitely collaboration to refine my approach

nodes.label: Teacher responsibility for student assessment and communication
nodes.label_negative: Delegating assessment and communication to AI
nodes.grounding_span: Reviewing student work is the responsibility of the teacher

nodes.label: Ethical AI use in education
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to show one way it could be used to enhance our work in a way that no one saw as cheating

nodes.label: AI as planning and structuring tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI allows teachers to plan and generate content with precision

nodes.label: Teaching effectiveness and student learning
nodes.grounding_span: I still need to know the curriculum, how students learn, and what suits my students

nodes.label: Professional integrity and ethical practice
nodes.grounding_span: I strongly believe the content must be generated by the teacher

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: time-saving and personalisation, which I see as critical

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as exemplar generator
nodes.grounding_span: The result was excellent. This was particularly satisfying

nodes.label: Resistance to AI replacing teacher judgment in assessment
nodes.grounding_span: Reviewing student work is the responsibility of the teacher - no question to me!

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: It's definitely collaboration to refine my approach

nodes.label: Ambivalence about future school culture
nodes.grounding_span: School culture could go either way - it could adapt or it could become more resistant

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: It's definitely collaboration to refine my approach

nodes.label: Ethical boundary-setting around AI use
nodes.grounding_span: Reviewing student work is the responsibility of the teacher
